hero.title: Welcome to
hero.name: Parabolica
hero.description: Redefining the digital boundary through architecture, engineering, and artificial intelligence.

about.title: About
about.description_part1: At Parabolica, we don’t just build experiences; we architect alternate realities. Our philosophy is rooted in the fusion of precision engineering and unbridled imagination.
about.description_part2: Whether it's the high-octane pressure of F1 Racing, the limitless horizons of VR Arena, or the tactical mastery of FPV Drones, we deliver the future, today.
about.philosophy: Our mission is to create a singular destination where every click is a journey, and every journey is an evolution.

stack.title: TECH STACK
stack.description: Our technological backbone - a symphony of modern tools and frameworks that power the void.

projects.title: EXPERIENCES
projects.intro: Step into our immersive zones. Click to explore the next generation of local entertainment.

items.title: F1 RACING
items.description: Experience professional-grade motion simulators and ultra-realistic F1 racing physics. Compete in world-class leagues.

items.title: VR ARENA
items.description: Enter the arena. 360-degree free-roam VR with haptic feedback and competitive team-based combat modules.

items.title: FPV DRONE
items.description: Master the art of FPV flight in our specialized training facility. Indoor courses and professional pilot certification.

items.title: OTHER GAMES
items.description: A diverse collection of high-tech and retro games, carefully selected for the ultimate enthusiast experience.

events.title: CELEBRATIONS
events.description: The ultimate destination for your special moments. From high-octane corporate events to unforgettable birthdays - we host them all.

items.title: BIRTHDAY PARTIES
items.description: Make your birthday legendary with immersive VR challenges, F1 racing tournaments, and a private party zone tailored for you.

items.title: CORPORATE EVENTS
items.description: Ditch the boring boardrooms. Foster team spirit with FPV drone competitions and VR escape rooms that challenge communication and strategy.

items.title: KITTY PARTIES
items.description: The ultimate social gathering. Enjoy high-tech entertainment followed by premium lounge services and customized dining experiences.

items.title: TEAM BUILDING
items.description: Strengthen your professional ties through high-stakes racing leagues and cooperative VR missions designed for high-performing teams.

contact.title: GET IN TOUCH
contact.subtitle: Ready to enter the arena?
contact.description: Whether you're looking for a professional partnership or simply want to book a session, our team is standing by.
